_comment: Tests New Med Skin's mandatory new patient consultation script (spoken + tool in same turn), VARIANT-FIRST for FACIAL_VOLUME sub-type, and SERVICE ALIAS QUICK-MATCH preventing false not-offered for 'botox'.

scenarios.name: New patient — mandatory spoken script + confirm_service in same turn

history.content: I'd like to book a PRF appointment.
Have you been to the clinic before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks 'As you're new, I'll need to set you up for a new patient consultation first -- Dr Leoni will guide the best course of action from there.' AND calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' with appointment_type='Consultation For New Patients' in the SAME turn. FAIL if agent speaks the script without the tool call, calls the tool without the script, or asks any other question.

scenarios.name: Botox alias — must resolve to Wrinkles and Lines, not not-offered

history.content: I'd like to book a botox appointment.
Have you been to the clinic before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type='Wrinkles & Lines', appointment_type_id='1706874590543750904'. FAIL if agent says 'we don't offer botox', routes to info_pivot, or uses any appointment type ID other than 1706874590543750904.

scenarios.name: Filler — VARIANT-FIRST must ask Contouring or Reversal before routing

history.content: I'd like to book a filler appointment.
Have you been to the clinic before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Were you after a Facial Contouring and Volume consultation, or a Filler Reversal consultation?' as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent routes to either sub-type without asking the variant question, or calls confirm_service silently.
